notes: Zeus is father of Helen in one tradition
Hera is mother of Hephaestus in some traditions
Poseidon is father of Bellerophon in some traditions
Aphrodite is involved in Ariadne traditions
Hephaestus and Daedalus are both divine or mortal craftsmen
Minos is linked to the Minotaur
Daedalus builds the Labyrinth for the Minotaur
Pegasus springs from Medusa in later tradition
Medea helps Jason obtain the Golden Fleece
Medea takes revenge after Jason betrays her
Circe transforms or detains Odysseus crew
Aeolus gives Odysseus the bag of winds
Achilles and Patroclus are close companions
Aeneas fights on the Trojan side with Hector
Diomedes and Odysseus are Greek allies
Nestor advises Agamemnon and the Greeks
Philoctetes is brought back with Odysseus involvement
Eteocles and Polyneices fight for Thebes
